query:
SELECT
                tp.pubkey,
                tp.signature,
                tp.proof,
                tp.updated_at,
                tp.status,
                ta.attestation
            FROM
                airbender_proof_generation_details tp
            LEFT JOIN
                airbender_attestations ta ON tp.pubkey = ta.pubkey
            WHERE
                tp.l1_batch_number = $1
            ORDER BY tp.l1_batch_number ASC, tp.tee_type ASC
